response.justification: While Maria is a capable, experienced engineer with a solid foundation in distributed systems and scale, she lacks the core expertise required for this Principal-level role. She has no demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, growth systems, feature-flagging infrastructure, or metrics/telemetry systems—which are central to the position. Her background is in general-purpose software engineering across web, mobile, and backend domains, not the specialized domain of growth and experimentation systems. A Principal role requires deep expertise in the domain, not just general engineering excellence.
strengths: 19 years of proven engineering experience including work on high-scale systems (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby, millions of mailings at Optilyz)
Demonstrated technical leadership through mentoring, open-source contributions, and teaching/workshop organization showing commitment to engineering culture
Solid grasp of distributed systems, microservices architecture, and infrastructure (AWS, Docker, CI/CD, DevOps)
concerns: Zero experience building or working on experimentation platforms, A/B testing systems, or feature-flagging infrastructure—core to this role
No demonstrated background in metrics, telemetry infrastructure, data analysis, or statistical methods despite role requiring 'high data aptitude'
Recent lateral move to re:cinq (April 2025) from pricing optimization work suggests lack of focused growth/experimentation career trajectory toward Principal level

key_factors.factor: Proven scale and distributed systems experience
Demonstrated mentorship and engineering culture impact
